SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

Class DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyRunner

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyRunner
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyRunner extends Object implements Serializable
Readiness-gated dynamic blowdown, PSV sizing, and flare-load study runner.

The runner converts a governed DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource into NeqSim transient calculations. It runs each source through DepressurizationSimulator, superimposes source loads with MultiVesselBlowdownStudy, sizes PSV orifices where a PSV basis is supplied, and builds a compact flare-load handoff with peak heat duty, cumulative emissions, radiation distance, and capacity checks.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:
